title: pilosella × rubra subsp. chaunanthes
intro: Pilosella × rubra subsp. chaunanthes, also known as the red rosy bittercress, is a rare and endangered subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Pilosella × rubra subsp. chaunanthes include its potential to treat gastrointestinal issues, such as ulcers and gastritis, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties which may alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies, especially for medicinal purposes.
